name: reverse_geocode
description: Convert geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) into a human-readable address. Returns the nearest street address, neighborhood, city, and country for the given location.

parameters.name: latlng
parameters.description: The latitude and longitude coordinates, comma-separated.

parameters.name: result_type
parameters.description: Filter results by address type, pipe-separated (e.g., 'street_address|route').

parameters.name: location_type
parameters.description: Filter by geocoding precision. Options: ROOFTOP, RANGE_INTERPOLATED, GEOMETRIC_CENTER, APPROXIMATE.

results.formatted_address: 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
